prompt: A clean, minimalist product still life for a beauty reel cover, shot in a vertical 9:16 composition. Place exactly 5 sunscreen and UV skincare products standing upright in a straight row on a pale off-white shelf against a warm ivory textured plaster wall. From left to right: 1) a glossy blue-to-gold gradient bottle with a rounded cap, 2) a matte white squeeze tube, 3) a slightly curved white squeeze tube with soft beige tinting and elegant black lettering, 4) a slim beige-pink tube with a metallic gold cap, 5) a white tube with blue labeling. Use soft natural sunlight coming from the left, creating delicate botanical leaf shadows on the upper left side of the wall and faint shadows behind the products. Keep the styling airy, premium, and understated, with lots of negative space above the products for cover text. Neutral cream, white, beige, and blue palette, realistic commercial photography, subtle texture, sharp focus on the packaging, gentle high-end skincare advertising mood.
